final_prompt.prompt:
Create an editorial street portrait photograph in 90s Hong Kong (any in-image text in Chinese, if rendered).

Style/medium: needs a "复古胶片" aesthetic — references in the spirit of 1990s Hong Kong cinema (Wong Kar-wai), 90s Japanese film photography, Kodak Gold 200 era color science; exact film stock and grain treatment is yours
Composition: framing is yours
Subject: must include a young woman in a denim jacket leaning against a neon sign as the focal subject
Scene/backdrop: must include 90s Hong Kong street at night with neon signage
Lighting/mood: needs a hazy night atmosphere with nostalgic mood — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs warm tones — exact hue balance is yours
Materials/textures: needs film grain texture — exact grain intensity is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: if any in-image text is rendered, default to Chinese
Avoid:
